title: Team directory
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, ID, or designation…
deleteConfirm: Delete this user account? This cannot be undone.
exportFilteredHint: Export will include only {{count}} selected department(s).
cannotEditAdmin: Only an Administrator can edit or remove Administrator accounts.
cannotAssignAdmin: HR Assistants cannot create or promote to Administrator.
employeeIdPisHint: Use the 12-digit PIS (e.g. 026740847000) — must match DMPREP/clock registration.

dmprepChecklist.subtitle: Employee: {{name}}
dmprepChecklist.warning: OpenHR and DMPREP do not automatically sync to the clock. Complete the steps in DMP REP software (192.168.15.69) before considering the process done.
dmprepChecklist.syncFailed: Failed to pull employees from DMPREP.

step2.title: Register in DMP REP
step2.detail: Open DMP REP and add the employee with the same PIS {{employeeId}}.

step3.title: Send to PrintPoint clock
step3.detail: In DMP REP, run the REP operation to send registration/biometrics to the clock.

step4.title: Validate punches in OpenHR
step4.detail: After the first punch, use Organization → System → Sync DMPREP or wait for the automatic poll (1 h).

step1.title: Deactivate in DMP REP
step1.detail: Remove or deactivate {{name}} in DMP REP before deleting in OpenHR.

step2.title: Remove biometrics from clock
step2.detail: In DMP REP, run the operation to remove the credential from PrintPoint III.

step3.title: Sync final punches (optional)
step3.detail: In Organization → System, click Import punches if pending marks exist.

step4.title: Delete OpenHR account
step4.detail: Confirm below to remove {{name}} from RH_Eletropasso.
